translations.en: a small, inscrutable woman, cloaked in shadows.
translations.zh: 一位身形嬌小、深不可測的女子，籠罩在幽暗之中。

translations.en: "Ah, hello Avatar. I was wondering when you would get here."
translations.zh: 「啊，聖者，你好。吾正在想汝何時會到。」

translations.en: "I see you have yet to fulfill your destiny."
translations.zh: 「吾見汝尚未完成命中注定之事業。」

translations.en: "I am the one known as @Penumbra."
"I am the daughter of the eclipse."
"I am a @fortune teller."
"Yes, I can foretell your @future for you."
"Yes he was a terribly @honest fellow."
"Alas, though, he lacked the virtue of tact."
translations.zh: 「然而惜哉，他欠缺圓滑的美德。」

translations.en: "He told the truth once too often, and those he spoke of did not appreciate it."
translations.zh: 「他說真話說得太多，被說者並不領情。」

translations.en: "He's buried in the catacombs under Moonglow now, pushing up @daffodils."
translations.zh: 「他如今長眠於月華城地下的墓窟，靜待@水仙花從身上綻放。」

translations.en: "Even virtue has its price."
"Yes, daffodils."
"I can tell you of both the @rune and the @mantra."
translations.zh: 「吾可告知汝@符文及@真言兩者之事。」

translations.en: "'Twas buried with @Beyvin, rest his shade."
translations.zh: 「符文已隨@貝文長埋地下，願其魂靈安息。」

translations.en: "Your destiny awaits."
"You must seek the answer to that elsewhere."
"For five gold coins I can use my powers to divine the mantra for you. Shall I do this?"
translations.zh: 「吾可以五枚金幣，運用神通為汝卜算真言。汝願否？」

translations.en: "It is a small price for so profound a word."
translations.zh: 「如此深奧之言，此代價不過小事。」

translations.en: "Your ambitions outreach your means."
She closes her eyes in concentration. For long minutes you wait.
translations.zh: 她闔目凝神。汝等候了良久。

translations.en: "What are we waiting for!" whispers Dupre.
translations.zh: 「我們在等什麼！」杜普雷低聲說道。

translations.en: "She's doubtless fallen asleep, and you've wasted good money for nothing..."
translations.zh: 「她恐怕已經睡著了，汝白白浪費了錢財……」

translations.en: Finally Penumbra opens her eyes again. "The word you seek is 'ahm.'"
translations.zh: 終於潘布拉再度睜眼。「汝所尋之真言乃『ahm』。」

translations.en: "I require a small donation for my services."
How much do you give her?
You don't have that much.
"So be it."
She holds her hands out on either side of her crystal ball, not quite touching it, and closes her eyes.
translations.zh: 她將雙手懸於水晶球兩側，幾乎要觸碰卻未觸碰，隨即闔上眼瞼。

translations.en: After a time, she speaks.
"The future looks dark. All is unclear."
"Some more gold would shed further light on your destiny..."
translations.zh: 「再奉上些許金幣，或可為汝的命運照亮更多……」

translations.en: How much do you give her?
You don't have that much.
"So be it."
"Though all is dark, I see a light at the end of the tunnel."
translations.zh: 「縱使黑暗籠罩，吾見隧道盡頭有一線光明。」

translations.en: "Quickly - more coins before I lose the thread of this vision!"
translations.zh: 「快——再多些金幣，吾即將失去此幻象的絲線！」

translations.en: How much do you give her?
You don't have that much.
"So be it."
"Much conflict lies before you. Your end..."
"I cannot see it. More gold is needed."
How much do you give her?
You don't have that much.
"So be it."
"You shall travel throughout the land before you are through."
translations.zh: 「汝將踏遍整片大地，方能完成使命。」

translations.en: "A few more coins and all should be clear."
translations.zh: 「再多幾枚金幣，一切便可清晰。」

translations.en: How much do you give her?
You don't have that much.
"So be it."
"You will journey into the depths of the earth..."
"Strange creatures will you face..."
"I can almost see the end now."
How much do you give her?
You don't have that much.
"So be it."
"You and your companions will face terrible choices..."
translations.zh: 「汝與汝的同伴將面臨嚴酷的抉擇……」

translations.en: "You will need powerful magic to prevail..."
translations.zh: 「汝將需要強大的魔法方能取勝……」

translations.en: "Wait... There is some barrier before me."
"Give me just one more coin and I think I can break through it."
translations.zh: 「再給吾一枚金幣，吾想吾能突破它。」

translations.en: How much do you give her?
You don't have that much.
"So be it."
"Yes, now all is made clear to me!"
translations.zh: 「是的，一切此刻清晰呈現於吾眼前！」

translations.en: "I see a great Vortex."
"There is a violet lens that is crucial to your quest. It is broken, and must be made whole."
translations.zh: 「有一片紫色鏡片，對汝的試煉至關重要。它已破碎，必須修復。」

translations.en: "But one lens is not enough! A blue lens is needed as well."
translations.zh: 「但一片鏡片不夠！還需要一片藍色鏡片。」

translations.en: "You must have two lenses, else all is for naught."
translations.zh: 「汝必須擁有兩片鏡片，否則一切徒勞。」

translations.en: She opens her eyes. "I can see no more for now. Leave me, that I might rest."
translations.zh: 她睜開眼睛。「吾目前無法再視。且去，讓吾休息。」

translator_notes: 潘布拉是神秘占卜師，語氣飄渺、引人入勝，且善於榨取金幣——搞笑橋段需保留幽默感。「ahm」真言保留英文（遊戲機制字）。Dupre 在此段引用。「pushing up daffodils」化用「pushing up daisies」慣用語，改以「水仙花從身上綻放」意象翻譯。
